description:
The release pipeline has failed on every run since v0.1.0 was published. Three fixes are required across two files.

## Root Causes

### 1. OIDC provenance causes 404 on every publish
`NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'` was added in PR #31. npm OIDC provenance for unscoped packages requires the package maintainer to link the GitHub repo in npmjs.com → Package Settings → Provenance. That setup was never done. Result: every release fails with:
```
OIDC token exchange with the npm registry failed: 404 OIDC token exchange error - package not found
```
**Fix:** Remove `NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'` from `.github/workflows/release.yml`. Provenance can be re-enabled after the npm trust relationship is configured.

### 2. `prepublishOnly` runs build + tests during publish
`package.json` has `"prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build && pnpm test"`. This fires during `semantic-release`'s publish step, re-running tests in the release environment. If any test flakes, the release dies after the version bump but before the npm push — leaving the repo in a broken half-released state. Helix explicitly avoids re-running tests in their publish pipeline.
**Fix:** Change `prepublishOnly` to `"pnpm run build"` only (remove `&& pnpm test`).

### 3. No explicit build step in release workflow
The workflow relies entirely on `prepublishOnly` to produce build artifacts. If that script is ever skipped (e.g., `--ignore-scripts`), there are no artifacts to publish.
**Fix:** Add an explicit `- name: Build` step (`pnpm run build`) in `.github/workflows/release.yml` before the Release step.

## Files to Change

### `.github/workflows/release.yml`
1. Add build step after `pnpm install`:
```yaml
      - name: Build
        run: pnpm run build
```
2. Remove `NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'` from the Release step env block.

### `package.json`
Change line:
```json
"prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build && pnpm test",
```
To:
```json
"prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build",
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `.github/workflows/release.yml` has an explicit `Build` step before `Release`
- [ ] `NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'` is removed from release.yml
- [ ] `package.json` `prepublishOnly` only runs build (not tests)
- [ ] `pnpm run format:check` passes on all changed files
- [ ] No other files modified
title: fix: harden release pipeline for reliable unattended npm publish

The release pipeline has failed on every run since v0.1.0 was published. Three fixes are required across two files.

## Root Causes

### 1. OIDC provenance causes 404 on every publish

### `.github/workflows/release.yml`
1. Add build step after `pnpm install`:

- [ ] `.github/workflows/release.yml` has an explicit `Build` step before `Release`
